message:
feat(mux): apply 50MB file size limit to uploads and file lists

Extended the 50MB file size limit to all transfer operations:

Before: Large files were only rejected during download processing, but still
included in file lists and accepted for upload. This meant:
- Upload file list could include 100MB+ files
- Client would attempt to upload them (wasting bandwidth)
- Server would accept and write them (disk exhaustion risk)

Now: Large files are filtered out early during file list building:
- walkDirectory(): Skip files > 50MB during directory scan
- walkDirectoryNoHash(): Skip files > 50MB in async version
- buildSingleFileEntry(): Reject single file if > 50MB

Changes:
- transfer.zig:1417: Add size check in walkDirectory (sync)
- transfer.zig:1599: Add size check in walkDirectoryNoHash (async)
- transfer.zig:1512: Add size check in buildSingleFileEntry

Result:
- Uploads are protected from large files (prevents disk exhaustion)
- File lists exclude large files (saves bandwidth)
- Clear log messages show what's skipped and why
